subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! He that hath loved Me and sought after Me hath made mention of thee. We make mention of thee through this wondrous remembrance which, when it floweth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمود قد ذکرک من احبنی و ارادنی ذکرناک بهذا الذکر البدیع الذی اذا جری من
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
